steps.text: Let's visit the farm! Farms are home to lots of animals. Find the cow and tap it!
steps.feedback: Moo! Cows give us milk. Now find the horse!
Horses are strong — farmers use them to help with work. Now find the duck!
Quack! Ducks love splashing in water. Now find the rabbit!
Rabbits love to hop and eat vegetables! Last one — find the dog!
Dogs help farmers look after the other animals. You found them all!
